rationale.fidelity: Retains the deterministic morning assignment, known jobs, certification/hours/exclusivity constraints, and scheduled-value objective while excluding emergency robustness.
rationale.managerial_framing: Concretely explains scarce qualified hours, opportunity cost, feasibility, daily trigger, and the matching question.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: It marks novelty and broader importance as provisional rather than asserting an unsupported contribution.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Correctly identifies emergency materiality as unsupported and bounds optimality to the listed deterministic jobs, excluding overtime and dynamic responses.
rationale.prose_clarity: Accurate and structured, but the readiness/gates wrapper and repeated mappings are more procedural than the prompt needs.
rationale.overall: Substantively complete and careful, with deductions confined to avoidable template overhead.
